title: Finite Water
body:
This mod makes it so water can no longer create new source blocks effectively making water a finite resource.

This change affects all water so if you pick up a water source block from an ocean, there will be a hole in the ocean.

Player created infinite water sources are no longer possible with this mod installed.


[![Sponsor Time](https://jonn.dk/akliz_banner_productivebees.png)](https://www.akliz.net/lobstermods)
